mapped.source:
config system interface
    edit "port1"
        set vdom root
        set ip 203.0.113.10 255.255.255.248
        set allowaccess ping https ssh http
        set role wan
        set status up
    next
end
mapped.target: set network interface ethernet port1 layer3 ip 203.0.113.10/29

mapped.source:
config system interface
    edit "port2"
        set vdom root
        set ip 192.168.1.1 255.255.255.0
        set allowaccess ping https
    next
end
mapped.target: set network interface ethernet port2 layer3 ip 192.168.1.1/24

mapped.source:
config system interface
    edit "vlan10"
        set vdom root
        set ip 10.0.10.1 255.255.255.0
        set interface port2
        set vlanid 10
    next
end
mapped.target: set network interface ethernet vlan10 layer3 ip 10.0.10.1/24

mapped.source:
config firewall address
    edit "LAN"
        set subnet 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0
        set comment "rete interna"
    next
end

config firewall address
    edit "SRV"
        set subnet 192.168.1.10 255.255.255.255
    next
end

config firewall address
    edit "UNUSED-ADDR"
        set subnet 10.9.9.0 255.255.255.0
    next
end

config firewall service custom
    edit "HTTPS"
        set protocol TCP
        set tcp-portrange 443
    next
end
mapped.target: set service HTTPS protocol tcp port 443

mapped.source:
config firewall service custom
    edit "UNUSED-SVC"
        set protocol TCP
        set tcp-portrange 9999
    next
end
mapped.target: set service UNUSED-SVC protocol tcp port 9999

mapped.note: interfaccia in uscita FortiOS 'port1' non riportata (PAN-OS usa il virtual-router)
mapped.source:
config router static
    edit "1"
        set dst 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0
        set gateway 203.0.113.9
        set device port1
    next
end
mapped.target:
set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route route-1 destination 0.0.0.0/0
set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route route-1 nexthop ip-address 203.0.113.9

mapped.note: NAT abilitato: regola NAT creata come anteprima separata, verificare source-translation
mapped.source:
config firewall policy
    edit "1"
        set name LAN-to-WAN
        set srcintf port2
        set dstintf port1
        set srcaddr all
        set dstaddr all
        set service HTTPS
        set action accept
        set nat enable
        set status enable
        set schedule always
        set logtraffic all
    next
end
mapped.target:
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" from port2
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" to port1
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" source all
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" destination all
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" service HTTPS
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" action allow
set rulebase nat rules "LAN-to-WAN" from port2
set rulebase nat rules "LAN-to-WAN" to port1

mapped.source:
config firewall policy
    edit "2"
        set name disabled-rule
        set srcintf port2
        set dstintf port1
        set srcaddr LAN
        set dstaddr SRV
        set service HTTPS
        set action accept
        set status disable
        set logtraffic disable
    next
end
mapped.target:
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" from port2
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" to port1
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" source LAN
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" destination SRV
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" service HTTPS
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" action allow

preview_text:
! Anteprima conversione fortios -> panos — SentinelNet Config Converter
! 11 elementi mappati, 9 non mappati (vedi elenco 'unmapped').

set network interface ethernet port1 layer3 ip 203.0.113.10/29

set network interface ethernet port2 layer3 ip 192.168.1.1/24

set network interface ethernet vlan10 layer3 ip 10.0.10.1/24

set address LAN ip-netmask 192.168.1.0/24

set address SRV ip-netmask 192.168.1.10/32

set address UNUSED-ADDR ip-netmask 10.9.9.0/24

set service HTTPS protocol tcp port 443

set service UNUSED-SVC protocol tcp port 9999

set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route route-1 destination 0.0.0.0/0
set network virtual-router default routing-table ip static-route route-1 nexthop ip-address 203.0.113.9

set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" from port2
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" to port1
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" source all
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" destination all
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" service HTTPS
set rulebase security rules "LAN-to-WAN" action allow
set rulebase nat rules "LAN-to-WAN" from port2
set rulebase nat rules "LAN-to-WAN" to port1

set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" from port2
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" to port1
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" source LAN
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" destination SRV
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" service HTTPS
set rulebase security rules "disabled-rule" action allow
unmapped:
config firewall address
    edit "SITE-FQDN"
        set type fqdn
        set fqdn example.com
    next
end

config system zone
    edit "trust"
        set interface port2 vlan10
    next
end

config firewall addrgrp
    edit "GRP1"
        set member LAN SRV
    next
end

config firewall vip
    edit "WEB-VIP"
        set extip 203.0.113.20
        set mappedip 192.168.1.10
        set extintf port1
        set extport 443
        set mappedport 443
    next
end

config system admin
    edit "admin"
        set accprofile super_admin
        set trusthost1 10.0.0.0 255.255.255.0
    next
end

config system admin
    edit "noguard"
        set accprofile super_admin
    next
end

config vpn ipsec phase1-interface
    edit "vpn-hq"
        set remote-gw 198.51.100.1
        set interface port1
        set proposal aes256-sha256
    next
end

config vpn ipsec phase2-interface
    edit "vpn-hq-p2"
        set phase1name vpn-hq
    next
end

config log syslogd setting
        set status enable
end
